## How to test it

<!-- Walk through how a reviewer can verify this works. Specific commands are better than "it should work." -->

```bash
# example:
python3 setup.py --target example/ --analyze
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No new dependencies (stdlib only)
- [ ] No hardcoded paths
- [ ] The change is idempotent — safe to run twice
- [ ] Docs updated alongside code (if a flag or behavior changed)
- [ ] Tested on my machine with the `example/` org
